news_items.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
news_items.summary: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

news_items.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
news_items.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

news_items.title: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
news_items.summary: Anthropic was the star of the show at San Francisco's AI-centric conference.

news_items.title: The largest orbital compute cluster is open for business
news_items.summary: Kepler Communications is flying 40 GPUs in Earth orbit. And its latest customer is Sophia Space.

news_items.title: Apple reportedly testing four designs for upcoming smart glasses
news_items.summary: These glasses are a step back from an ambitious plan that once called for Apple to launch a variety of mixed and augmented reality devices.

news_items.title: Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home
news_items.summary: The OpenAI CEO's new blog post responds to both an apparent attack on his home and an in-depth New Yorker profile raising questions about his trustworthiness.

news_items.title: OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership
news_items.summary: OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.

news_items.title: TRUSTBANK uses AI agents to personalize Furusato Nozei gifts
news_items.summary: TRUSTBANK partnered with Recursive to build Choice AI using OpenAI models, enabling personalized conversational recommendations that simplify Furusato Nozei gift discovery.

news_items.title: SafetyKit scales risk agents with OpenAI’s most capable models
news_items.summary: Discover how SafetyKit leverages OpenAI GPT-5 to enhance content moderation, enforce compliance, and outpace legacy safety systems with greater accuracy .

news_items.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
news_items.summary: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass-casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.
